name: Regular Expression Matching
description: Given a string s and a pattern p, implement regular expression matching with support for '.' (matches any single character) and '*' (matches zero or more of the preceding element). The matching should cover the entire string.
constraints: 1 <= s.length <= 20. 1 <= p.length <= 20. s contains only lowercase English letters. p contains only lowercase English letters, '.', and '*'.

performance.stress_intent: separate regex DP from exponential backtracking using repeated a* groups followed by a final mismatch
